_comment: Spatial contracts — positional & computed-style assertions verified at runtime via Playwright. Catches: missing CSS cascade, off-scale computed font-size, sticky elements that aren't sticky, children overflowing parents, siblings not aligned, element overlaps, WCAG AA contrast failures.

position_rules.description: Bottom nav must touch viewport bottom
Top navbar must be sticky at y=0 on scroll
Badge must sit at top of its plan card (possibly extending above)

containment_rules.description: Card children must stay within card bounds
Page children must not overflow container horizontally
Chat bubbles must not escape their chat-list container
Text and time labels must stay inside the visible bubble fill (no spilling past the coloured pill)

sibling_alignment_rules.description: All navbar items must be on the same horizontal line
Ashare V2 mobile navbar: brand logo and action buttons must share the same horizontal baseline

no_overlap_rules.description: Cards in a list must not overlap each other

computed_value_rules.selector: body, .ac-input, .ac-btn, .ac-card, h1, h2, h3, p, label, a, span, div
computed_value_rules.__comment: Scale is rem-based; these px values cover 14px AND 16px root font-sizes
computed_value_rules.description: Every rendered text element's computed font-size must be on the scale
Input must have non-zero border-width in its computed style
Buttons must be ≥ 32px tall for fingertip tap (relaxed from 40 to allow sm variants)

contrast_rules.selector: body, .ac-card, .ac-input, .ac-btn, h1, h2, h3, p, a, label, span
contrast_rules.description: WCAG AA — text vs background contrast ≥ 4.5:1

text_overflow_rules.description: Rendered text must not extend past its parent's clientWidth (scrollWidth > clientWidth indicates horizontal clipping/overflow)

box_model_rules.description: Widgets that may declare width/max-width together with padding MUST compute `box-sizing: border-box` so padding stays inside the box and the widget never exceeds its parent's width.

Widgets must have non-zero padding on every side (top, right, bottom, left) so their inner content never touches the border. One-sided padding indicates a broken CSS rule (e.g. `padding: 8px 0` on a pill bubble).

cluster_atomicity_rules.description: Stat-card children (icon, value, label) must sit in a compact cluster — if the tallest child is > 40px taller than the shortest, the card likely lost its grid/flex layout.

template_compliance_rules.description: Every rendered page's top-level wrapper must be one of the approved shell classes AND receive non-default computed styles (background or border). Unstyled <nav>/<div> indicates missing template CSS.

ui_only_ops_rules.description: Clicking a language or theme toggle must not fire any /api/ HTTP request — these are pure client-side state mutations
